scripts.build: bun --bun vite build && bun run build:scripts && bun run build:copy-native
scripts.build:scripts: bun build scripts/setup-schema.ts scripts/bulk-load.ts scripts/compact.ts scripts/backfill-descendants.ts --target=bun --external shard-db --outdir=build/scripts
scripts.build:copy-native: mkdir -p build/node_modules && cp -rL node_modules/shard-db build/node_modules/ && (cp -r node_modules/node-gyp-build build/node_modules/ 2>/dev/null || cp -rL node_modules/shard-db/node_modules/node-gyp-build build/node_modules/)
